content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — WARN — user-facing toggle label says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" in SettingsView.swift:13
Pierre: Apple's 2.2 guideline expects App Store builds to be finished, not beta or experimental. This string is shown directly to users in Settings, so it may trigger review questions about whether the feature is production-ready. Consider softening the wording (e.g. "Beta features may not preserve sort order") or removing the "experimental/unstable" framing from the shipping build.
